failure_movement.justification: Empty shrank direction-correct (18→12) but far from predicted 3-6. Unknown exploded +23 (29→52) vs predicted shrink to 20-24. Wrong grew (6→9) vs predicted shrink. Correct collapsed 47→27 vs implied growth. Three of four clusters wrong direction; only empty directionally right with wrong magnitude.

trace_movement.justification: 256-token cluster did vanish (correct), but ceiling shifted to 512 with 12 tasks hitting it, not leftward/downward shift. Avg completion tokens rose 148→177 (predicted downward). Prompt tokens rose +335 (predicted flat/slight rise—directionally right but magnitude substantially underestimated).

side_effects.justification: Truncation regression risk was flagged and appears validated (unknown cluster exploded 29→52, consistent with critical spans cut off). DeepSeek ignoring no-reasoning instruction also confirmed (12 tasks still hit 512-token ceiling with empty outputs). Noise-from-more-hits risk mentioned but harder to distinguish from truncation.
